overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk from a sunny sandy beach, through a transit underpass and up concrete stairs, emerging into an urban waterfront plaza with modern architecture, palm trees, and a large digital billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with seawall and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy beach toward a concrete seawall with scattered palm trees

entered.detail: tall palm trees casting shadows on the sand
long concrete barrier wall separating beach from the city
calm water visible along the shoreline
sandy terrain with scattered debris and dry vegetation
patches of dry yellow grass growing on sand

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny beach with golden sand, scattered palm trees, and a concrete seawall in the distance. The camera walks forward along the shoreline with the ocean visible to the right, passing dry grass patches and sand dunes.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to Los Osos transit station underpass

events.description: entering the dark underpass beneath the Los Osos building

agents.ego_description: approaching the yellow Los Osos building and entering the shadowed underpass entrance

entered.detail: large yellow building with prominent blue 'LOS OSOS' signage
dark tunnel entrance leading under the building
concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti tags
tall geometric building visible behind the station

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the distinctive yellow Los Osos transit station, passing graffiti-covered walls and palm trees. The scene transitions from bright sunlight into the shadowy concrete underpass entrance, with modern buildings visible in the background.

events.description: transition from bright sunlight to dimly lit underpass
emerging from the dark stairs into bright sunlight at the top

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete staircase with metal railings toward the plaza above

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with multiple flights ascending upward
metal handrails running along the left side of the stairs
modern high-rise building visible at the top of the stairwell exit

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a long concrete stairwell with graffiti-covered walls and metal railings, transitioning from the dark underpass into bright sunlight. The modern office building becomes visible at the top of the stairs as the camera climbs steadily upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with modern buildings and palm trees

events.description: turning right to follow the plaza pathway toward the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking through the sunlit plaza past modern architecture and scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: female pedestrian in red top standing near the curved building entrance

entered.detail: futuristic building with curved facade and dark windows
multi-level parking garage with stepped concrete design
piles of wooden pallets and construction debris
elevated wooden decking along the waterfront area

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs into a bright urban plaza, the camera turns right past a curved modern building and a tiered parking structure. A few pedestrians are visible, including a woman near the building entrance, as the camera approaches the waterfront boardwalk area with construction materials visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with digital billboard and colonnade

events.description: entering the covered colonnade walkway beneath the large structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront boardwalk toward a massive digital billboard and columned underpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the waterfront path in the distance

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the edge of the waterfront
tall vertical billboard with orange and purple digital display
long covered walkway supported by massive concrete columns
small commercial stand with signage on the boardwalk

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along the wooden waterfront boardwalk with the ocean visible to the left, approaching a massive digital billboard and a long columned underpass structure. A few pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the camera enters the shadowed colonnade walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, natural shoreline into the structured concrete environment of an urban transit hub. It begins by walking along a sunny beach of golden sand and dunes, passing scattered palm trees with the ocean stretching out to the right. As the camera approaches a concrete seawall, the scene transitions from the open sunlight into the shadows of the yellow Los Osos transit station, moving past graffiti-covered walls and modern buildings. The camera then enters a dark underpass before steadily ascending a long concrete stairwell flanked by metal railings. Finally, the view emerges from the gloom of the stairs back into bright sunlight, revealing a towering modern office building at the top.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open urban plaza into the shadowed depths of a waterfront colonnade. It begins as the camera emerges from a set of stairs, turning right past a curved modern building and a tiered parking structure where a few pedestrians linger. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens up toward a waterfront boardwalk area marked by scattered construction materials. The camera then transitions onto the wooden boardwalk with the ocean visible to the left, approaching a massive digital billboard. Finally, the bright daylight fades as the camera passes oncoming pedestrians and enters the deep shade of a long, columned underpass structure.
